name: digital-marketing-pro
description: The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 153 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow, EU AI Act Article 50 ready. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. Installable on Cursor 2.5+ via /add-plugin digital-marketing-pro@https://github.com/indranilbanerjee/digital-marketing-pro in any Agent chat.
